error.minUI5VersionNotMet: The card generator is only supported for projects with UI5 version {{featureVersion}} or higher. Detected minimum UI5 version is {{minUI5Version}}. Update the 'sap.ui5.minUI5Version' property in the 'manifest.json' file to be able to use the cards generator feature. Also make sure the UI5 version used when starting the cards generator is {{featureVersion}} or higher (Check run configurations, ui5 yaml configuration files, etc.)
error.prerequisitesNotMet: Minimum UI5 version requirement for card generator is not met.
